summary: Bug fix verification for LoyaltyCard points redemption - All validation scenarios working correctly. Backend APIs: 6/8 passed (75%). Frontend UI: All 4 validation scenarios verified.
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix float('inf') in LOYALTY_TIERS to be JSON serializable (e.g., use 999999999 instead)
critical_code_review_comments: LoyaltyCard.js fix is correctly implemented - all validation scenarios working
When balance < min_redeem (100): Input and button hidden, informational message shown
When entering points > balance: Button disabled, red border on input, error message 'رصيدك X نقطة فقط'
When entering points < min_redeem: Button disabled, error message 'الحد الأدنى 100 نقطة'
When entering valid points: Button enabled, shows point value info

success_rate.backend: 75% (6/8 tests passed - 2 minor failures for /tiers and /settings endpoints)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily added 150 points to test user for validation testing, then reset to 0
context_for_next_testing_agent: LoyaltyCard redemption bug fix verified. All validation scenarios working: 1) Balance < 100: shows message, hides input/button. 2) Points > balance: disabled button, red border, error message. 3) Points < 100: disabled button, error message. 4) Valid points: enabled button. Backend /api/loyalty/tiers and /api/loyalty/settings return 500 due to float('inf') not being JSON serializable - minor issue.

frontend_ui.Scenario 1 - Balance < 100 points: ✅ VERIFIED - Input/button hidden, message 'تحتاج 100 نقطة على الأقل للاستبدال' shown
frontend_ui.Scenario 2 - Enter points > balance: ✅ VERIFIED - Button disabled, red border, message 'رصيدك X نقطة فقط'
frontend_ui.Scenario 3 - Enter points < 100: ✅ VERIFIED - Button disabled, message 'الحد الأدنى 100 نقطة'
frontend_ui.Scenario 4 - Enter valid points: ✅ VERIFIED - Button enabled, shows 'كل نقطة = 100 ل.س'

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Red error shown when clicking redeem points button
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Disable redeem button and show informational messages instead of allowing submission and showing error
bug_fix_verification.fix_status: VERIFIED - All validation scenarios working correctly
